arts.ttl: In-depth with Josh Coburn as he relishes chance to learn off Millwall all-time record goalscorer Neil Harris
arts.sum: Josh Coburn is confident that working under Millwall’s all-time record goalscorer Neil Harris is only going to benefit his all-round striking game. Millwall wanted to sign Coburn on a permanent deal this summer but had to settle instead for the Middlesbrough targetman joining on a season-long loan.

arts.sum: Ex-England international finally completes long-awaited move from Luton to Turkey

arts.ttl: Luton's Andros Townsend FINALLY completes his move to Antalyaspor after Turkish transfer ban is lifted... as the winger's nightmare month in limbo comes to an end
arts.sum: Townsend signed a contract with Antalyaspor in August but the Turkish club couldn't register the 33-year-old because of a transfer ban imposed by FIFA.

arts.ttl: ‘Romain Esse contract extension is hugely important to Millwall ‘ - Neil Harris on new deal for exciting Den prospect
arts.sum: “We all talk about the model that Jimmy wants to create and Romain becomes a huge part of that,” Harris told the South London Press . Lambeth-born winger Esse, 19, has started every Championship match this season and has also broken into the England Elite League squad – formerly the U20s.

arts.ttl: Two Millwall key performers in final year of Den deals - as head coach talks about conversations ‘naturally taking place’
arts.sum: Millwall head coach Neil Harris has talked about the natural cycle for player contract talks to commence – with Duncan Watmore and George Honeyman both inside the final 12 months of their Den deals. “You mention about Duncan and George, arguably two of the best performers in our team and two of the best performers in the league, probably, in the opening four games.
